introSection: Godiståget (Swedish for Candy Train) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Kolmården in Norrköping, Östergötland, Sweden. The ride was a part of an expansion of the children's area for the park's 50th anniversary.
fullText: Godiståget (Swedish for Candy Train) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Kolmården in Norrköping, Östergötland, Sweden. The ride was a part of an expansion of the children's area for the park's 50th anniversary.
